channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Two sign lights not working, 19th July
item.description:
Two sign lights, on different columns are unilluminated at night, beside Anerley Entrance to Crystal Palace park. 1) Sign light to round one way blue sign on column P906, on south side of the road. 2) sign light to rectangular one way blue sign on lamppost column, unable to ID column number, on north side of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black pen & stickers on green metal fence gate, 19th July
item.description:
On the green railway fence gate, at junction of Ledrington Road with Crystal Palace station approach, there is black pen graffiti and some stickers. Could the stickers and graffiti be cleaned up, please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ledrington Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Width limit blue rectangular sign and sign lamp is rotated 45° away from facing oncoming traffic in Shortlands Rd fronting the recycling bins in Shortlands Station car park., 19th July
item.description:
Width limit blue rectangular sign and sign lamp is rotated 45° away from facing oncoming traffic in Shortlands Rd fronting the recycling bins in Shortlands Station car park. Google Streetview historical image and current situation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove both 'Shopping Centre Parking' finger posts from the CCTV pole in High St Penge, about 10m W of the jct with Penge Lane fronting the Watermen's Alms Houses Lodge., 19th July
item.description:
Please remove both 'Shopping Centre Parking' finger posts from the CCTV pole in High St Penge, about 10m W of the jct with Penge Lane fronting the Watermen's Alms Houses Lodge. Bromley sold the Blenheim Centre shops and multistorey car park to property developers who closed the car park about a year ago. There will be no replacement car park. The two signs are redundant and misleading. Please remove them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several abandoned voi bikes across the footpath and blocking entrances., 19th July
item.description:
Several hire bikes are blocking the pavement which is quite narrow here. This means that you cannot walk past safely or with a buggy or pram.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Penge Post Office, 100-102 High Street, Penge SE20 7HB - several spray tags on (black?) roller shutters., 19th July
item.description:
Penge Post Office, 100-102 High Street, Penge SE20 7HB - several spray tags on (black?) roller shutters. PO is closed and shutters down when seen on a Sunday afternoon
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Illegal vehicle. No MOT. Abandoned., 19th July
item.description:
Reporting this for a second time. This vehicle has arrived on recovery vehicle. Abandoned. No MOT. Parked in public free space for several months. This vehicle should be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 of 2 in Penge Lane cnr of Queen Adelaide Rd - purple tag on side of light grey Community Fibre telecomms cabinet, 19th July

item.title: 3 tags or 3 flyoposts, I forget which, on grey Rear of BT phone kiosk near 128, High St Penge (Colman House shops)., 19th July

item.title: Fly posted sign in dangerous position, 19th July
item.description:
This sign is in a dangerous position on a BT pole that is easy to walk into. My son walked into it and has suffered serious injury.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broomhill Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th July
item.description:
People have once again dumped items like TVs next to the block of flats on nightingale place

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Vale, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nw34sl, 19th July
item.description:
Subject: Request to Repaint Public Bench Outside 73 Haverstock Hill Dear Camden Council, I hope you are well. I would like to report that the public bench outside 73 Haverstock Hill, NW3 is looking worn and the paint has deteriorated. As this is a busy local area and many residents and visitors use the bench, I would be grateful if it could be inspected and repainted as part of your maintenance programme. Thank you very much for your time and support. Kind regards, Luna

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adelaide Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposter affixed to pedestrian crossing guard railings in Kent House Rd about 3m from the jct with High St Penge., 19th July
item.description:
Flyposter affixed to pedestrian crossing guard railings in Kent House Rd about 3m from the jct with High St Penge. About 1m x 0.7m about business or office space. It's been there at least 3 days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 19th July
item.description:
A few potholes in Glengall, at the junction of Sheridan Road, Bexleyheath. Would appreciate inspection and if eligible, to be repaired please. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: String of potholes, 19th July
item.description:
A number of potholes, most are at the Avenue Road end of Sheridan Road, Bexleyheath. There are also lines/cracks across the carriageway at intermittent intervals. Additionally, there are a few potholes in Glengall, at the end of Sheridan. Would appreciate inspection please and if eligible, patching or full resurface. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fronting 1, Linden Grove, Penge (by Penge East Station, north side) Lime hir abandoned horizontally obstructing the public footway., 19th July
item.description:
Fronting 1, Linden Grove, Penge (by Penge East Station, north side) Lime hir abandoned horizontally obstructing the public footway. The bike is blocking the public footway especially for blind persons, wheelchair users people with prams and pushchairs. Photo date stamped 13.51 Sunday 19/7/26 .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Linden Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
